Hi, I’d like to report an issue with my Silver Prime purchase.

I paid for both the 60 and 980 Silver Prime drips, but I only received the 60 drip. Before this transaction, I already had 980, as I had bought it an hour or less before the 60 and 960 ones, so my total should’ve been 2020. Right now, my account only shows 1040, which isn’t enough for the 1980 pre-anniversary package I was trying to buy.

Could you please check the missing 980 Silver Prime and help restore it to my account? I can provide screenshots or receipts if needed.

Thank you!

Went from 8574 Health to 6393, but only 687 Damage is told to be taken. The "Onyx Plume" Damage was 189. Excluding the Onyx Plume, which applied corrosion and did not take it, The health is 8385 to 6393. The actual damage taken was 1992, and the damage which took corrosion advantage was 498(687-189). This shows that only exactly 1/4 of damage was calculated as being dealt, so that 300% damage from corrosion was left out.
This, combined with the difficulty patch, makes it impossible to achieve "deal 7300 damage" because corrosion is not calculated.
💭「Processing」Corrosion Damage is not correctly included in 'Deal XX damage in one turn' calculation
Erosion is currently not considered as causing harm, and optimization will be considered in the future.
✅「Answered」Corrosion Damage is not correctly included in 'Deal XX damage in one turn' calculation

✅「Answered」Karen Bug

I encountered an unexpected behaviour: 
1. Silver Relic "☆Withered Pupil☆" was used on Murphy's 3 cost Vortex Reversal card, permanently changing it to 1 cost.
2. During battle, Tawil's Omniscient Verity becomes a copy of Vortex Reversal with **2 cost**, ignoring the relic and instead applying the -1 cost discount to the original 3 cost Vortex Reversal. 

In the draw pile, Vortex Reversal is shown with 1 cost. When the top card is drawn, it is Vortex Reversal with 1 cost. So I expected that when copying the card in my deck, Omniscient Verity would become 1 -1 = 0 cost Vortex Reversal.

Is this intended— Omniscient Verity references the original form of the copied card and ignores relic effects— or is it bug?
💭「Processing」Omniscient Verity and Withered Pupil Relic
